series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains document which are relevant to the acquisition of land and utility relocation used for The Department of Transportation projects. The complete list of records included in this series may be found in the Ohio Department of Transportation, Real Estate Acquisition Manual under Section 5800 Records Retention.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Scan paper documents into electronic when received. Destroy paper documents after scanned images are checked for quality and completeness. ; Microform: Retain microfilm permanently. This will only apply to files created prior to the availability of electronic scanning and uploading. ; Electronic: Retain images of entire file for 40 years. Retain images that evidence the vesting of title to a parcel in the Department for as long as the Department owns the parcel., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Delete
